title: Reed's Tidal Schedule
description: Reed can tell you, to the minute, when the rising tide will close the beach to vehicle traffic — approximately forty minutes from now, at 0710. After that, the draw must be open and cleared before the tide recedes enough for the second attempt, which will not come until afternoon. The second wave's armor has a forty-minute window. This is not a tactical estimate — it is a navigational fact, and Reed states it with the flat certainty of a man reading a chart.
